data.title: Presidio and EQV Ventures announce SEC registration statement approved, shareholders meeting on Feb 27, 2026.
data.description: An upcoming Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders has been planned for February 27, 2026, to vote on the approval of a significant business combination. This meeting will involve shareholders considering and deciding on the proposed merger, acquisition, or partnership. It marks a crucial event for the company as it looks to potentially join forces with another entity. The meeting date marks a pivotal moment for shareholders to cast their votes and influence the future direction of the organization. Make sure to mark your calendar and participate in this essential decision-making process on February 27, 2026.

data.title: Enzon Pharmaceuticals begins exchange offer for its Series C Preferred Stock linked to Viskase merger.
data.description: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Cranford, New Jersey, revealed on Jan. 30, 2026, that it has initiated an exchange offer related to its Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock (Series C Preferred Stock) as part of a merger with Viskase Companies, Inc. The offer is available for holders of the Series C Preferred Stock, as outlined in the Prospectus/Consent Solicitation/Offer to Exchange. Enzon Pharmaceuticals trades on the OTCQB under the symbol ENZN.

data.title: Reflex Advanced finalizes private placement offering.
data.description: In the latest update, it was reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has reached over 5 million globally, with the death toll surpassing 300,000. The United States continues to be the most affected country, with over 1.5 million confirmed cases and more than 90,000 deaths. In Europe, Italy and Spain are among the hardest-hit countries, with over 200,000 cases each. Meanwhile, efforts to develop a vaccine are ongoing, with several clinical trials showing promising results. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to control the spread of the virus and support their economies during these challenging times.

data.title: Abacus Global Management to repurchase $20 million worth of shares, reflecting confidence in business model and earnings.
data.description: The Board of Directors has expressed strong confidence in the company’s long-term business model, recurring earnings, and capital strength, emphasizing their support for the direction of the company. This showcases a positive outlook on the company’s future prospects and stability. The endorsement from the Board underscores their belief in the company’s financial health and potential for sustained growth. This affirmation is significant as it highlights the support and trust of the Board in the company's strategies and financial performance, further solidifying investor confidence.

data.title: Bitcoin mining profits drop to lowest in 14 months due to winter storm impact on miners, CryptoQuant says miners are paid below value.
data.description: Bitcoin miners are being paid significantly less than expected considering the soaring price of Bitcoin and the existing mining parameters, as indicated by a recent report from CryptoQuant.

data.title: Tuya Smart presents AI toys at Spielwarenmesse 2026 in Nuremberg, showcasing innovative products.
data.description: In Nuremberg, Germany, on January 30, 2026, Tuya Smart, a leading AI cloud platform service provider listed on NYSE as TUYA and HKEX as 2391, introduced innovative AI products at Spielwarenmesse 2026 from January 27 to 31. The company revealed undisclosed information during this event, attracting attention with their groundbreaking developments.

data.title: WestBond's Q4 2025 net profit rose 24.8% to $217,948 ($2,973,050 in sales), slightly down from Q3 2025.
data.description: In Delta, British Columbia, on January 30, 2026, WestBond Enterprises Corporation (TSX-V: WBE) reported a significant increase in net profit for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The net profit rose by 24.8% to $217,948 compared to the previous quarter's profit of $174,630 ending on September 30, 2025. Despite the profit increase, sales for the same period saw a slight decrease. Sales were reported at $2,973,050 for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, showing a 1.9% decrease from $3,030,669 in sales for the quarter ended September 30, 2025.

data.title: Ero Copper (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) to release Q4 and Full Year 2025 results on March 5, 2026, with conference call on March 6, 2026 at 11:30am Eastern time.
data.description: Ero Copper Corp. will release its operational and financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 on March 5, 2026, after markets close. A conference call is scheduled for March 6, 2026, at 11:30am Eastern time (8:30am Pacific time) to discuss the results. The presentation will be downloadable through a webcast link and the Presentations section of the company's website on the day of the call. Ero Copper Corp. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as ERO and on the New York Stock Exchange as ERO.

data.title: AZZ Inc. in Texas introduces new stock repurchase program in 2026. Board approved initiative to buy back $100 million shares.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas on January 30, 2026, AZZ Inc. (NYSE: AZZ), a top provider of hot-dip galvanizing and coil coating services, revealed the approval by its Board of Directors of a fresh stock repurchase initiative, known as the "2026 Share Repurchase Program."

data.title: New Gold receives final court approval for arrangement with Coeur Mining; approved by Supreme Court of British Columbia.
data.description: In Toronto on January 30, 2026, New Gold Inc. (TSX: NGD) (NYSE: NGD) shared that the Supreme Court of British Columbia finalized approval for the Company's plan of arrangement under the Business Corporations Act.

data.title: Origin Agritech reports fiscal year 2025 results, files Form 20-F. (NASDAQ: SEED). Year ended Sep 30.
data.description: Origin Agritech Ltd., a prominent Chinese agricultural technology company, disclosed its financial performance for the year concluding on September 30. The company, trade identified as SEED on NASDAQ, submitted its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year 2025. The filing was made on January 30, 2026, providing stakeholders and investors with comprehensive insights into the company's operations and results. This marks a significant step towards transparency, accountability, and regulatory compliance for Origin Agritech Ltd.

data.title: NexPoint Residential Trust (NYSE: NXRT) discloses 2025 dividend income tax treatment on common stock.
data.description: Today, NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. (NYSE: NXRT) disclosed the definitive income allocations for its 2025 dividend distributions on common stock. This information is crucial for shareholders to accurately report their earnings. This announcement comes after the company's successful dividend distributions in 2025, providing transparency and clarity to investors.

data.title: BankFirst Capital Corporation reports $10.17M earnings in Q4 and $28.68M for 2025. Net income per common share was $1.74.
data.description: Headquartered in Columbus, Mississippi, a financial institution named BankFirst Capital Corporation (OTCQX: BFCC) recently disclosed its financial performance. The parent company of BankFirst Financial Services in Macon reported a net income of $10.17 million. This equated to earnings of $1.74 per common share during Q4 of 2026.

data.title: Gold crashes 12% due to $1.68B crypto liquidations. Market forces triggered by margin calls and trading algorithms. Structural bull case for precious metals remains strong. Bitcoin fall led to forced selling, impacting gold and silver markets. Precious metals still have strong fundamentals.
data.description: A recent incident, involving a 12% drop in gold and 33% drop in silver in one trading session, was caused by various factors aside from monetary policy. A significant portion of the drop was linked to a $1.68 billion wave of cryptocurrency margin calls, with 93% of trades being long positions being forced closed. This chain reaction was exacerbated by regulators raising margin requirements globally and trading algorithms creating a feedback loop. The crash started in Bitcoin futures markets on January 29, resulting in forced selling across exchanges. Portfolio margin accounts, used by hedge funds and pro traders to treat all bets as collateral, played a crucial role in linking the crypto crash to the precious metals selloff. This complex chain reaction underscores the importance of understanding market dynamics and the structural bull case for precious metals remains strong despite the leverage breakdown.

FED’S BOWMAN: RATE HOLD WAS A CLOSE CALL Fed Governor Michelle Bowman said holding rates steady was not an easy decision and reflected a need for more data. She said policy remains moderately restrictive, but after 75 basis points of cuts last year, the Fed can afford to wait.
